title: Fix webpack runtime error — incomplete node_modules stub in worktree
root_cause: The worktree at /worktrees/191/ has a fake/stub node_modules containing only stripped versions of 'next' (missing dist/shared/, dist/lib/, dist/client/, etc.) and 'styled-jsx'. These stubs shadow the full Next.js 15.1.0 installation in the parent workspace's node_modules, causing webpack to fail with 'Module not found: Can't resolve ../shared/lib/utils' and related errors.
infrastructure_changes: Remove stub node_modules directory from worktree
Run npm install to create a complete node_modules installation (768 packages)

steps.detail: Verify that node_modules/next/dist/shared/ is missing from worktree, and that parent workspace has the full installation at /Users/kevinliu/.appfactory/workspaces/kids-education-app-v4/node_modules/next
Delete /worktrees/191/node_modules entirely. The stub (248K, 2 packages) is restored each iteration by the system, so we use npm install as the persistent fix.

steps.action: Run npm install for complete local installation
steps.detail: npm install creates a complete local node_modules (768 packages) that replaces the stub. This is the persistent fix — it survives iteration resets that would otherwise restore the stub.
npm run build exits with code 0. All 13 pages compiled. Only 2 pre-existing ESLint warnings (ref cleanup in ListenAndFind, MatchingPairs) — acceptable, do not block build.

steps.action: Start dev server and verify pages
steps.detail: Start dev server on port 3042. All 4 required routes return HTTP 200.
HTTP response for / includes <title>LittleBridge 小桥</title> — confirms app is serving correctly, not webpack error page.
Run npm test to verify all 207 unit tests still pass after the fix.
Commit with descriptive message explaining WHY (corrupted node_modules stub shadowing full installation). Write .af/tasks/191/pr-body.md.

expected_tests: All 207 existing unit tests must pass
npm run build exits with code 0

actual_results.build: PASS — exit code 0, 13 pages, 2 ESLint warnings (pre-existing, non-blocking)

risk_areas.risk: Stub node_modules is restored at the start of each coding iteration by the system
risk_areas.mitigation: Run npm install at the start of each iteration to replace the stub with the real packages (768 packages, ~500MB)

risk_areas.risk: Parent node_modules might have cached/stale packages that differ from worktree package-lock.json
risk_areas.mitigation: npm install creates a fresh local installation matching package-lock.json exactly
risk_areas.probability: N/A — using npm install, not parent directory fallback

persistence_strategy: N/A — this task fixes infrastructure, not data persistence. App uses IndexedDB (browser-local) for all data, which survives page refresh.
error_handling_approach: N/A — this task fixes infrastructure. Existing components already have try/catch with user-facing error messages (verified in code review).
rationale: The root cause is entirely in the node_modules directory (untracked, in .gitignore). No source files need to be changed. The fix is: run npm install to replace the incomplete stub with a full local installation.

errors: Module not found: Can't resolve '../shared/lib/utils' in node_modules/next/dist/pages/_app.js
Module not found: Can't resolve '../shared/lib/constants' in node_modules/next/dist/pages/_document.js
Module not found: Can't resolve '../server/get-page-files' in node_modules/next/dist/pages/_document.js
Module not found: Can't resolve '../server/htmlescape' in node_modules/next/dist/pages/_document.js
Module not found: Can't resolve '../lib/is-error' in node_modules/next/dist/pages/_document.js
build_failure_details.cause: stub node_modules/next/dist/ only had compiled/, pages/, server/ — missing shared/, lib/, client/, build/, esm/, etc.
build_failure_details.fix: npm install — creates 768 packages locally, build passes with exit code 0
